response.original_title: Oakwood College & AYS Ministries Presents: This Little Light
response.overview: “This Little Light” is a special worship experience presented by Oakwood College and AYS Ministries, filmed live in Huntsville, Alabama. Featuring the voices, testimonies, and ministry gifts of Oakwood College students in 2005, this program captures an evening of heartfelt singing, powerful preaching, and authentic student‑led worship. What began as a blessing for those in the room now becomes a blessing for every viewer who joins in this unforgettable celebration of faith, music, and youthful devotion.
response.title: Oakwood College & AYS Ministries Presents: This Little Light
